subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath circumambulated the sanctuary of Thy beauty and visited the House of Thy majesty and Thy Kaaba [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذا عبدک الذی طاف حرم جمالک و زار بیت جلالک و کعبه
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @mystical themes, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
